title: convolvulus fruticulosus subsp. glandulosus
intro: Convolvulus fruticulosus subsp. glandulosus is a plant species commonly known as the glandular bindweed, which is a subspecies of the Convolvulus fruticulosus plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Convolvulus fruticulosus subsp. glandulosus include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote wound healing, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system.
